final:
module qam_transmitter(
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] I,
    input wire [3:0] Q,
    output reg [7:0] QAM_signal
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        QAM_signal <= {I, Q}; // Combine I and Q components
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      QAM_signal <= ~{I, Q};
    end
  end

endmodule
